data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limits user choices to improve decision-making time and user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Designs interfaces with a minimalistic approach to choices and navigation.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes control size and arrangement for better user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Ensures larger touch targets for commonly used buttons and actions.

data.title: Affordance
data.description: Design cues are utilized to indicate how an action can be performed.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates visual and interactive design elements that suggest their usage.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Positive emotional responses to aesthetically pleasing design improve usability perception.
data.technical_spec: Focuses on clean, modern design with visually appealing elements.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Applies principles of grouping and organization to improve user comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Designs interfaces to guide user vision and interaction paths naturally.
